movie.title: Raja Shivaji (2026) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Marathi] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Raja Sivaji (2026) Chronicles the rise of young Shivaji Bhonsale, who challenged the might of established empires to found the Maratha kingdom and lay the groundwork for ‘Swarajya’ (self-rule) during a turbulent period of Indian history.
